title: JRN-Guided Heterogeneous Architecture: GBM Probe Estimation and 5-Config Comparison on rel-stack
summary: Demo notebook loading pre-computed JRN experiment results from rel-stack dataset. Demonstrates JRN matrix extraction, 5-config performance comparison (JRN-guided, uniform-mean, uniform-rich, top-K, oracle), win-rate analysis, oracle gap computation, aggregation sensitivity, feature efficiency metrics, and 4-panel visualization (JRN heatmap, config bars, oracle gaps, efficiency). Uses mini_demo_data.json with full metadata including 11 joins across 3 tasks.
